# Pull requests are not accepted

Hey there, and thanks for your interest in Notebook Navigator.

This project does not accept pull requests, and pull requests are closed automatically.

With the emergence of agentic coding, I can no longer quality-control outside code submissions to the standard the project needs, so all code stays under a single design and release process.

**Summary: Pull requests are not accepted. Ideas are very welcome as feature requests.**

## Other ways to help

- **Feature idea?** [Open an issue](https://github.com/johansan/notebook-navigator/issues) - I read and reply to everything.
- **Found a bug?** [Open an issue](https://github.com/johansan/notebook-navigator/issues) - bug reports are always welcome.
- **Want to help?** Testing and feedback are the most useful things right now.

Thank you for your understanding!
